one_time_description: Prior period adjustment: Investment in MLTC Resource Development LP was not previously recorded; asset of $6,436,670 and related equity pickup added via restatement of prior year figures
economic_notes: Member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (9 nations). Holds 11.1% interest in MLTC Resource Development Limited Partnership (LP equity $96.6M, LP revenue $39.9M). Also holds interests in White Buffalo Development Corp (50%) and Accurate Industries Holdings Inc. (100%), both recorded at nominal value. Party to Management Action Plan with ISC due to cumulative deficit position.
notes: Audit is a Disclaimer of Opinion due to serious deficiencies in accounting records and internal controls. Prior year (2020) also had a Disclaimer of Opinion. Significant prior period restatement: MLTC RDI LP investment of $6,436,670 not previously recorded; restated 2020 figures shown. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($16,040,635) + Ottawa Trust ($3,900) + Meadow Lake Tribal Council ($8,027,982) + CMHC ($335,934) + Northern Lights Community Development ($82,891) + First Nations Trust ($307,472) + Government of Saskatchewan ($0) + Health Canada ($0) = $24,798,814 before deferral adjustment; OSR is negative due to deferral of unexpended funding (-$5,505,830) making the revenue mix complex. Capital schedule shows $1,813,888 in expenses including housing O&M. No remuneration schedule included in extracted text. Nation is in Saskatchewan (Meadow Lake area), member of MLTC. Management Action Plan with ISC in place.
